tools.description: An interactive disassembler for the CPU 6502, focused on Commodore 8-bit computers. Features a TUI with modern features like x-ref, undo/redo, flow arrows, keyboard-driven, MCP server for auto analysis, VICE debugger and more!

tools.name: embedded-debugger-mcp
tools.author: Adancurusul
tools.description: A Model Context Protocol server for embedded debugging with probe-rs - supports ARM Cortex-M, RISC-V debugging via J-Link, ST-Link, and more
